# kSecTrustCertificateTransparency

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a Boolean used to indicate Certificate Transparency.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecTrustCertificateTransparency: CFString
```

## Discussion

When the key is present and the value set to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/kCFBooleanTrue], it indicates the chain is Certificate Transparency (CT) qualified.
title: kSecTrustCertificateTransparency
